items.title: China braced for second typhoon in a week as Bavi approaches landfall
items.summary: Hundreds of thousands of people are evacuated from eastern Zhejiang province, with the city of Wenzhou close to the path of the storm.

items.title: UK’s First Hospital for Houseplants – Where Plants Are Put on Drips and Treated for Bugs
items.summary: Britain’s most unique hospital is now open—where the “patients” are houseplants. Some are “put on drips” and some may go into quarantine, but all get the same loving care from Rosanna Costello, who st…
